Crop Name: wheat

Profile
- Season type: medium-season (TSUM total=1857 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: cool-adapted (TBASEM=0.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength + vernalization (IDSL=2, DLO=16.80 h)
- Root/water trait: moderately deep-rooted, more drought-tolerant (RDMCR=125.00 cm, DEPNR=4.50)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=35.83)
- Storage allocation: mid storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.00)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0200
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0110, DVS1=0.0040
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.1200, DVS1=0.0400

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
